0011001011111110101000000011011000101101 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 01 * 0
  101 = 1 * 01
  110 = 11 * 0
  0000 = 00 * 00
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00110 = 00 * 110
  01011 = 010 * 11
  11000 = 110 * 00
  101010 = 101 * 010
  101101 = 101 * 101
  000000110 = 0000 * 00110
  0011001011 = 00110 * 01011
  1111101010 = 1111 * 101010
  11000101101 = 11000 * 101101
  00000011011000101101 = 000000110 * 11000101101
  00110010111111101010 = 0011001011 * 1111101010
  0011001011111110101000000011011000101101 = 00110010111111101010 * 00000011011000101101
